name: metacoding
description: MetaCoding — local-first code-graph + CTKR categorical knowledge for AI agents, served over MCP

plugins.name: metacoding
plugins.description: The /metacoding skill: how to drive the MetaCoding MCP server — typed graph navigation, FTS over the AST blind spots, live LSP, and the CTKR same-role / motif / structural-embedding tools. The server itself ships separately on npm as @identikey/metacoding.
